_comment: Copy this to storage/key_value_stores/default/INPUT.json for local testing
_mode_youtube_research: Use searchKeyword + notionPageId to run the YouTube → Notion workflow
_mode_generic_agent: Use task for generic Notion operations (omit searchKeyword)
task: Find all pages about Q1 planning and list their titles
_llm: Set llmProvider to anthropic or openai
